title: AI Arena task
description: A challenge that submissions answer. Lives at tasks/<task>/task.json. Add "$schema": "../../schema/task.schema.json" to your file for live editor validation.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema for editor tooling.

title.description: Task title shown in the sidebar and header.

type.description: Default media type inherited by submissions that don't set their own.

runtime.description: Optional runtime hint, e.g. webgl / unity — used to warn about WebGL context limits.

prompt.description: The full challenge prompt (rendered with a copy button).

description.description: Short summary shown under the title.

id.description: Stable task id; defaults to the folder name. Used in the URL hash.
